evals.prompt: We already approved the spec update and now I am saying 'continue with the amended plan and finish the implementation.' Decide whether to reopen clarification.
evals.expected_output: Treats the approved spec-governed update as governing context and continues without reopening unnecessary clarification.
expectations: Recognizes the request as an approved spec-governed continuation.
Proceeds under the existing governing artifacts.

evals.prompt: The manager wants to use a reviewer sub-agent but the path is approval-gated. Decide whether this should be pushed back to the user as a new open-ended clarification question.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the decision in manager mode instead of turning it into an unnecessary user clarification loop.
expectations: Keeps the approval-gated delegation issue in manager mode.
Does not ask a low-value restatement question.

evals.prompt: The request is ambiguous about which service owns a new contract and the repo has no approved spec or plan yet. Decide whether clarification is required.
evals.expected_output: Still triggers bounded clarification when the ambiguity is material and not already resolved by governing artifacts.
expectations: Recognizes a materially ambiguous ownership decision.
Requests bounded clarification instead of guessing.
Does not over-trigger on already approved context.
